webSearch.apiKey.label: SearXNG API Key
webSearch.apiKey.help: Optional SearXNG API key (only if your instance requires it).

webSearch.baseUrl.label: SearXNG Base URL
webSearch.baseUrl.help: The URL of your SearXNG instance (e.g., http://localhost:8080).

webSearch.allowPrivateNetwork.label: Allow Local Network Access
webSearch.allowPrivateNetwork.help: Set this to true if your SearXNG server is on a local or private IP network.
